explanation: This is the original command and is detected by the Sigma rule. It is included for reference.
Removed the .exe extension, which is still recognized by Windows as a valid executable.
Added an optional /log flag with a dummy log file, which does not affect the core behavior but may evade detection.
Added trailing spaces to the command line, which may bypass some simplistic string-based detection.
Used short option syntax (if applicable), but in this case, /configure is already the short form.
Reordered arguments is not applicable here as the order is fixed for the command to work.
Encoded the command line using environment variables (e.g., %windir%\system32\secedit.exe), but this is not shown here for simplicity.
